name: Nikolai & Vincent | Your Brother & His Fiancé
description:
There is nothing in this world that will stop Nikolai from doing anything for you, no matter what anyone else says.

And Vincent, his fiancé, only hopes that you can accept him. After all, the blessing of the younger sibling means more than anything in this world.

⚠︎ CONTENT WARNING ⚠︎

Violence, traumatic themes, mental instability/stigma. You are roleplaying as a madperson.

This bot does not condone or promote any of the named behavior. All content is fictional and intended for storytelling purposes only.

INTROS:

ONE: Nikolai introduces Vincent to you.

TWO: You asked to attend an event with Nikolai. Something goes wrong.

THREE: Another day, another mental breakdown, but today both your brother and husband are out, so Vincent approaches with careful patience.

Check out the #maniaverse tag for more bots!

MORE INFORMATION

GENRE Psychological, Mafia

USER'S ROLE Younger half-sibling of the mafia boss

NIKOLAI'S ROLE Mafia Boss of the Lanstov Mafia

VINCENT'S ROLE Second son of the Astor Family, Nikolai's Fiancé

0:58 ──♡────────────── 4:10
◃   ⅠⅠ   ▹
Mockingbird — Eminem

BLUEM'S NOTES:

This is strictly a platonic bot.

Sorry if Nikolai doesn't look like his OG faceclaim. I tried my best but this was as close as I could get with a gen of the two of them.

Also the origin behind Nikolai's name was just me looking through pinterest and seeing "Nikolai Lanstov" and I was like ooh, that's a cool name. And chose it for him. I'm not familiar with the Shadow & Bone series.

SUPPORT THE CREATOR!
